agent.report_title: RingConn 竞品产品动态日报

competitors.name: Oura
competitors.rationale: Category benchmark for sleep, recovery, readiness, app experience, subscription, and patent strategy.
queries: Oura Ring product update release feature app
Oura Ring 4 firmware sensor sleep readiness update
Oura patent smart ring Samsung Ultrahuman Circular
Oura subscription membership health app update

competitors.name: Samsung
competitors.rationale: Phone ecosystem competitor with no-subscription positioning and strong Android distribution.
queries: Samsung Galaxy Ring product update Samsung Health AI
Galaxy Ring 2 release battery sensor sleep update
Samsung Galaxy Ring firmware update health features
Samsung smart ring patent Oura lawsuit

competitors.name: Ultrahuman
competitors.rationale: No-subscription smart ring competitor with metabolic, fitness, and recovery positioning.
queries: Ultrahuman Ring product update release feature
Ultrahuman Ring Pro launch battery charging case
Ultrahuman Ring Air app update sleep recovery
Ultrahuman Oura patent import ban settlement

competitors.name: Circular
competitors.rationale: Differentiates through haptics, ECG/AFib messaging, AI assistant, and team dashboard.
queries: Circular Ring 2 product update ECG AFib
Circular Ring 2 launch feature update Kira AI
Circular smart ring team dashboard clinical update
Circular Ring sizing app battery update

competitors.name: Amazfit
competitors.rationale: Affordable sports ecosystem competitor with Amazfit wearable bundling and app ecosystem leverage.
queries: Amazfit Helio Ring product update sleep monitoring
Zepp Health Helio Ring firmware update
Amazfit Helio Ring app feature update
Amazfit smart ring new product release

competitors.name: Movano Health
competitors.rationale: Women-health smart ring positioning and medical-sensor roadmap are relevant to segmentation and claims.
queries: Evie Ring product update Movano Health
Movano Health Evie Ring app update
Movano Health blood pressure glucose smart ring update
Evie Ring women's health feature update

competitors.name: Fitbit
competitors.rationale: Adjacent health platform competitor: tracking sleep, readiness, AI insights, subscription, and sensor features that influence user expectations.
queries: Fitbit app update sleep readiness score feature
Fitbit Premium update subscription features
Pixel Watch Fitbit update health sensor sleep
Fitbit patent health sensor update

competitors.name: Noise
competitors.rationale: India-market smart ring competitor; useful for tracking regional pricing and distribution.
queries: Noise Luna Ring product update feature
Luna Ring smart ring app update India
Noise smart ring launch update

competitors.name: boAt
competitors.rationale: India mass-market wearable brand that can pressure entry pricing.
queries: boAt Smart Ring product update
boAt smart ring launch feature app
boAt Ring health wearable update

competitors.name: Low-cost cross-border rings
competitors.company: COLMI / Rollme / RENPHO and similar brands
competitors.rationale: Tracks low-price feature diffusion, marketplaces, and consumer expectations below RingConn price bands.
queries: COLMI smart ring product update
Rollme smart ring product update
RENPHO Lynx smart ring update
budget smart ring launch no subscription

competitors.name: Whoop
competitors.rationale: Screenless recovery subscription benchmark and frequent software-feature competitor for health insights.
queries: Whoop product update recovery sleep feature
Whoop app update health insights
Whoop subscription wearable launch update

competitors.name: Garmin / Apple / Samsung Watch
competitors.rationale: Tracks adjacent sleep, recovery, health sensor, and AI features that can reset user expectations.
queries: Apple Watch sleep recovery health sensor update
Garmin sleep recovery health feature update
Galaxy Watch Samsung Health sleep recovery update
